modules.name: OSINT: aircraft position API
modules.description: Polls a free, keyless public ADS-B API for aircraft positions and lands them as observations - no radio required. Combines with the AIS decoder for a single ship + aircraft situational picture.

manifest.name: OSINT: aircraft position API
manifest.description: Polls a free, keyless public ADS-B API for aircraft positions and lands them as observations - no radio required. Combines with the AIS decoder for a single ship + aircraft situational picture.

run.missing_hint: python3 not found - install it (python3 ships with Ubuntu 24.04 by default)

settings_schema.description: How often to poll the upstream aircraft API.
